backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (UserProfile, Workspace, Project, Lead, ScheduledPost), in-memory state maps, and CRUD/query functions for a multi-workspace enterprise SaaS backend with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each product feature (frontend screens, backend functions) to the source files, component dependencies, and test IDs that implement them.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point setting the viewport, page title ('Enterprise AI SaaS'), and mounting the React app via the /src/main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root TanStack Router setup with AuthGuard and ProfileGuard components protecting all routes, and route definitions for Dashboard, Projects, Leads, PostScheduler, AIGenerator, and VisionAnalyzer under a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Fixed mobile bottom navigation bar with six icon+label tabs (Dashboard, Projects, Leads, Posts, AI, Vision) that highlights the active route with a teal accent.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Authenticated page shell composing TopBar, a scrollable Outlet content area, and BottomNav within a max-width centered column.
frontend/src/components/LeadCard.tsx: Card component displaying a lead's name, phone, source, and a color-coded status badge (new/contacted/converted).
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: Card component showing a project's name, client ID, monospace project ID, and a color-coded status badge (pending/active/completed).
frontend/src/components/ScheduledPostCar: Renders a card displaying a scheduled social media post with platform icon, status badge, content preview, and formatted scheduled time.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: Displays a single statistic with an icon, value, title, and optional subtitle in a styled card with configurable color themes.
frontend/src/components/TopBar.tsx: Sticky header component showing the app logo, user profile info (role and workspace), avatar initial, and a logout button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile, dashboard stats, projects, leads, and scheduled posts CRUD operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for dark/light theming, and custom utility classes like gradients and glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AIGenerator.tsx: Page component providing a prompt input UI to generate AI text via mutation, with suggestion shortcuts, error display, and a copy-to-clipboard result panel.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page that displays workspace stats (projects, leads, scheduled posts, AI generations) in a grid of StatCards, with admin-only access control and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/Leads.tsx: Leads page that lists captured leads and provides an inline form to create new leads with name, phone, and source fields.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page supporting Internet Identity authentication and a post-login setup form for new users to register their name, email, role, and workspace ID.
frontend/src/pages/PostScheduler.tsx: Post Scheduler page that lists scheduled social media posts and allows admins to compose and schedule new posts for Instagram, Facebook, or LinkedIn with a datetime picker.
frontend/src/pages/Projects.tsx: Projects page that lists workspace projects and lets admin or company-role users create new projects via a modal dialog with name, client ID, and status fields.
frontend/src/pages/VisionAnalyzer.tsx: React page component that lets users upload an image (up to 5MB), preview it, and submit it for AI-powered analysis via the `useAnalyzeImage` mutation hook, displaying the result or any errors.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL/hash query parameters, persist them to sessionStorage, retrieve them with URL-first fallback, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark-mode support, custom color palettes (teal, charcoal, semantic tokens via oklch), extended border radii, box shadows, font families, and keyframe animations for the enterprise dark-mode UI.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (schema v1, version 3) describing the enterprise AI SaaS app's architecture, existing features, known issues, image requirements, and tech stack (React/TypeScript frontend + Motoko on Internet Computer).
